expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: result.md states the provided holdout evidence is only a QA plan comparison and "does not provide evidence about the orchestrator contract behavior... nor does it demonstrate preservation of a different feature planning flow" and concludes the cross-feature non-regression focus is "not explicitly demonstrated."

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: The outputs consistently scope to the holdout phase ("Primary phase checkpoint under test: holdout"; "Evidence reviewed (holdout)") and refrain from asserting success without evidence, explicitly marking BLOCKING due to insufficient holdout regression evidence ("we cannot validate holdout regression alignment... based on the provided evidence").
